title: × trichoechinopsis imperialis
intro: × Trichocereus or Trichoechinopsis imperialis is a hybrid cactus, resulting from the cross between Trichocereus pachanoi and Trichocereus bridgesii. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its psychoactive compounds, which include mescaline, a natural hallucinogen. The health benefits of × Trichocereus or Trichoechinopsis imperialis include its potential to induce feelings of spiritual connection and introspection, as well as its possible therapeutic effects on anxiety and depression. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with some herbalists also using it to make capsules or other oral preparations.
